summary: Kids Check-in Production Readiness - PASSED. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Bidirectional sync verified between parent portal and admin dashboard. Register Family modal functional. Pickup code verification flow working end-to-end.

issues: Parent name shows 'Unknown' for some children - may need parent info enrichment fix

admin_dashboard.details: LIVE indicator visible, 'Updates every 2s' shown, 2 children currently checked in

register_new_family.details: Modal opens correctly with all fields (parent name, email, phone, child name, birthdate, allergies, notes). Successfully creates parent user and child record.

bidirectional_sync.test: Parent check-in reflects on admin immediately
bidirectional_sync.details: Verified parent check-in from /portal/kids appears on admin dashboard within 2 seconds via polling

pickup_code_verification.details: Valid codes show child info, parent info, and Release Child button. Invalid codes correctly rejected.

admin_checkout.details: Successfully checks out children, updates status to 'checked_out'

admin_direct_checkin.details: Admin can check in children directly from Check In tab for walk-in families

member_portal_kids.details: Shows 3 children (2 checked in with pickup codes visible, 1 available for check-in). Summary shows '2 children learning God's Word!'

ui_tests_passed: Admin Kids Check-in Dashboard loads at /kids-checkin
Register New Family button present and functional
Register Family modal opens with all form fields
Currently Checked In tab shows 2 children with pickup codes
Check In tab shows available kids for walk-in check-in
Check Out tab has pickup code input and Verify Code button
Pickup code verification shows Valid Pickup Code with child/parent info
Release Child to Parent button available after verification
Member Portal shows children with check-in status
Member sees pickup codes after checking in child
Member sees 'Currently in Sunday School' summary
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Parent name shows 'Unknown' in admin view for some children - parent_user_id lookup may need adjustment
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_kids_checkin_iter19.py - Created comprehensive test file for Kids Check-in features
seed_data_creation: Test family registered via API with TEST_ prefix during backend tests. Currently 2 children checked in: Emma Johnson (CSH-2830) and Test Kid 123 (BOT-2996).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kids Check-in feature is PRODUCTION READY. Admin dashboard polls every 2 seconds for real-time updates. Register Family modal creates both parent account and child record. Pickup code verification shows child info with Release button. Member portal shows pickup codes and 'Currently in Sunday School' summary. SMS notifications are MOCKED (logged to console).

mocked_apis_note.sms_notifications: SMS via Twilio is MOCKED - messages logged to console with [SMS MOCK] or [MOCK SMS] prefix instead of sending real SMS
mocked_apis_note.fully_functional: All other features (auth, check-in, checkout, register family, bidirectional sync) are fully implemented with MongoDB persistence
